description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Generate API Coverage that can be triggered manually. In a single macos-15 job, check out the repository, set up dependencies without ccache, generate C++ code coverage reports for binaries and libraries in the ./cpp directory, and sync the resulting HTML documentation to an S3 bucket named AWS_S3_CODE_BUCKET in the us-east-1 region, but only if the workflow is run on the main branch.
